segment.source: Renders an intro (eyebrow, heading, subheadline) above a list of client entries, each with an optional logo, a name that links to the client's website, and an industry label. Use it for: named customer or partner rosters in a document — reference lists, 'trusted by' sections, portfolios naming clients with their sectors. Prefer 'Logo Grid' or 'Logo Carousel' when only logos matter; 'Case Study Grid' when each customer has its own story.
